rationale: The cited paper appears in a single grouped citation in the SHDP methods section, where the authors describe LDA as a commonly used topic model. In that context, it functions as an example of prior LDA use in marketing rather than as a specific source of constructs, measures, or empirical procedures reused in this study. The citing paper's core methodological development and implementation are grounded in its own SHDP/state-space framework, with no distinct dependence on this particular cited article beyond background positioning.
